sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112932" key="xairhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χαιρ-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n112932.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">jovial, hilarious,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:18:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
